desc: Fix MED-05 (audit log tamper-evidence) and HIGH-09 (webhook secrets plaintext). 1) In llm-analysis.js writeAudit(): after building the JSON line, compute HMAC-SHA256 of the line using process.env.AUDIT_HMAC_KEY (fallback: 'aw-audit-key'). Append the hex digest as field 'sig' before writing. In audit.html display the sig field in a truncated monospace span. 2) In auth-db.js webhook storage: when inserting a webhook, store sha256(secret) as webhook_secret_hash. Remove the raw secret from DB. On webhook delivery (ngo-routes.js), the client provides secret in X-Webhook-Secret header — compare sha256(header) to stored hash using timingSafeEqual.
stack: Node.js, crypto, better-sqlite3 — llm-analysis.js, auth-db.js, ngo-routes.js
instructions: Return a unified git diff covering a/output/llm-analysis.js and a/output/auth-db.js. Surgical edits only. No markdown.
